usage_rules: Use confirmed_extra_functions as runtime-verified additions to the current LuaApi docs.
Do not use documented_but_not_available functions in generated addons without another targeted runtime check.
Treat changelog_candidates_not_available as old/removed/obsolete API names.
Do not treat userMods config functions in already_documented_runtime_hits as new; they are already present in current docs.

context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v34_result: SetPlacementPlain changed SlotsPlate02 to posX=283,posY=0 and SlotsPlate03 to posX=566,posY=0, hid the scrollbar, and widened DepositeBoxContentInner/DepositeBoxContainer, but user screenshot showed the outer bank panel clipped the moved plates. Next attempt must widen ContextDepositeBox and MainPanel too.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v36_result: Do not repeat. WidgetTreeLogger_v36_BankSlotColumns moved concrete Slot01-Slot12 widgets relatively and derived stepX/stepY from already-mutated SlotsPlate size. Across repeated bank opens it inflated SlotsPlate size to 19112x8192 then 38248x16384 and pushed visible content off-screen.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v37_plan: Built stable absolute-coordinate test. It applies only when bankVisible=1 and mainVisible=1, forces fixed known dimensions, and sets Slot01-Slot12 absolute coordinates instead of adding deltas to current mutated placement.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v40_result: Verified: hiding SlotsPlate01/02/03 removes item contents but leaves the empty bank slot grid/background visible. Therefore SlotsPlate widgets are not the visual empty-cell background; they carry bank contents/interactions over a parent-drawn grid.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v41_plan: Built a parent-level hide probe for DepositeBoxContentInner to find whether the empty-cell grid/background is drawn by the inner panel or a higher container/layer.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v43_result: MainPanel is the only tested bank widget with HasBackground=true. MainPanel:SetBackgroundColor(0) removes decorative bank frame/skin while item contents and black slot grid remain.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v44_result: Do not use as final. v44 cleared MainPanel background and moved plates, but also resized ContextDepositeBox/MainPanel/containers; this caused the bank window/content to collapse or move off-screen, leaving only pieces such as Close button.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v45_plan: Built a safer micro-test: clear MainPanel background and shift SlotsPlate01/02/03 by only +35,+20 without resizing any bank/container widget. Purpose is to see whether item contents visibly follow SlotsPlate placement when frame background is cleared.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.v45_result: Verified: MainPanel background can be cleared and SlotsPlate01/02/03 placement values change by +35,+20, but visible bank item/grid rendering does not reliably follow those SlotsPlate placement changes. SlotsPlate placement is not enough for final bank columns.
context_depositebox_layout_experiments.current_conclusion: Native bank visual rendering has at least two separate concerns: MainPanel background/frame, and bank grid/item rendering. Moving/hiding SlotsPlate affects logged widget state and sometimes contents, but the stable visible grid is not controlled by SlotsPlate placement. Next useful path is either create an addon overlay/custom grid fed by bank data, or search for bank/container API to render contents into custom widgets rather than trying to rearrange the native grid.

remort_window_movement_and_scroll_isolat.short_rule: Without AdvancedRemortList bytecode, wait for EVENT_REMORT_LIST_GAINED, force native RemortList root width to 500, and resize root plus Panel/Content/__Content together. For n rows: rootY=n*49+139, contentY=n*49-1, viewportY=contentY+2, panelY=contentY+119.
remort_window_movement_and_scroll_isolat.verification_note: Opening and full-list expansion are runtime verified; the final +2 px compensation in v2 is built but still awaits an in-game confirmation.

bagbankmover_v8_latest_test.conclusion_ru: v8 запускается, регистрирует ручки, применяет позицию Remort, окно воплощений перетаскивается и сохраняет координаты. Ошибок в mods.txt нет. Пользователь сообщил: вроде работает.

labsinfo_remort_laba_source.short_ru: LabsInfo injects Entry.Class1 into RemortList and reads lab visits from matchMaking event weeklyVisits/maxVisitsPerWeek.

bag-bank-widgetlogger-v1-heavy-run-2026-.problem: v1 was too heavy: repeated full dumps plus per-second tree signatures.

bag-bank-widgetlogger-v2-run-2026-06-03..note: This run contains both v1 tail and v2. Addons folder now has only v2, so v1 was still loaded in the existing game session.

source_addon.name: BagBankMover_v5
source_addon.status: reference implementation: correct movement method for bag and bank

bag.native_handle_status: do not use native bag header for DND; ContextBag.Bag.Header is already registered by the game

overlay.positioning: sync to the real rect of stateMainForm.ContextBag.Bag, centered over the bag title/header area
overlay.visibility: show only while the bag window exists and is visible

bank.important_correction: move the ContextDepositeBox root, not ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel

overlay.reason: overlay handles around the bank create invisible clickable/drag areas near the bank window

widget_form_requirements.bank_handle_note: BankMoveHandle may exist as a resource but must be hidden and not used for bank dragging.

registration.bag: register DND on the addon overlay handle with DNDRegisterGeneric(true)
registration.bank: register DND on native HeaderText with DNDRegisterGeneric(true)
registration.state_check: call DNDGetState first; only register when DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED
registration.id_mapping: store dnd id to logical key: idToKey[id] = 'bag' or 'bank'

pick: read the target window placement with GetPlacementPlain
store start cursor position and start placement
drag: compute dx and dy from EVENT_DND_DRAG_TO real cursor coordinates
convert real deltas to virtual deltas through common.GetPosConverterParams
apply moved placement immediately with SetPlacementPlain
store lastPlace after every drag update
drop: do not recompute movement from EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT when it has no cursor coordinates
save lastPlace, not the initial placement

placement_rules.normalization: Before applying or saving, normalize placements through stablePlacement.

stablePlacement.reason: LOW-anchor placement avoids bank glitches from dragging/saving inner MainPanel or BOTH/HIGH anchored placements.

placement_rules.hidden_window_apply: Apply saved placement even if a window is currently hidden, so the bag does not visibly appear in the default position and then jump to the saved position.
placement_rules.show_notification: Call SetOnShowNotification(true) on both target windows and handle EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED by applying the saved placement immediately.

known_bad_approaches.problem: The game already registers this widget for DND, causing 'Widget already registered for DnD' and bag movement failure.
The bank can move but leaves/glitches invisible or detached interactive areas. Move ContextDepositeBox root instead.

known_bad_approaches.approach: Use addon overlay handle for the bank
known_bad_approaches.problem: Creates invisible clickable/drag regions around the bank window.

known_bad_approaches.approach: Save placement on drop by recomputing from EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT coordinates
known_bad_approaches.problem: Drop event may not carry cursor coordinates; this can save the original position and make the window snap back.

known_bad_approaches.approach: Apply saved bag position only on EVENT_SECOND_TIMER
known_bad_approaches.problem: The bag appears at its default position first, then visibly jumps to the saved position.

minimal_reference_pseudocode.bag: move ContextBag.Bag using transparent addon BagMoveHandle overlay
minimal_reference_pseudocode.bank: move ContextDepositeBox root using native ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel.HeaderText
minimal_reference_pseudocode.on_drop: save lastPlace to avatar config and confirm drop
minimal_reference_pseudocode.on_show_changed: apply saved stable placement before/when the window becomes visible

widget-tree-runtime-2026-06-04-v6-named-.tree_accuracy_note: This is a named-children/logical tree. It may not match the visual/core tree shown by InspectWidgets; observed example: ContextDepositeBox.SlotsPlate is logged as a direct child of ContextDepositeBox, while InspectWidgets shows it under MainPanel.DepositeBoxContainer.__Border.__Content.DepositeBoxContentInner.

inspectwidgets_correction.note: Use the inspector/core path for exact visual tree; use named-children path only for GetChildUnchecked-style access if runtime confirms it works.

widget-tree-runtime-2026-06-04-v6-v20-co.name: WidgetTreeLogger v6/v20 coverage comparison

v20.end_marker: END widget core tree dump totalNodes=18852

normalized_union.normalization: strip leading stateMainForm. when comparing v20 core paths with v6 root paths
normalized_union.conclusion: v6 adds logical/named root coverage; v20 adds richer core-tree metadata. Maximum coverage should combine both.

broken_or_limited_approaches: Single startup dump is only a snapshot of widgets created at that moment; it is not complete coverage of every UI state in the game.
Using only GetWidgetCoreTree(stateMainForm) misses named/logical roots seen by v6.
Using only hardcoded known roots misses richer core metadata and depends on root list freshness.

widget-tree-logger-v30-combined-strategy.name: WidgetTreeLogger_v30 combined maximum-coverage strategy
widget-tree-logger-v30-combined-strategy.verification_needed: Capture new Personal/Logs/mods.txt after running WidgetTreeLogger_v30.pak and compare coverage with analyze-widget-coverage.ps1 or an updated parser.

widget-tree-logger-v30-aggressive-multip.finding: Aggressive repeated full-tree dumps freeze/hang the client and prevent interactive widget opening during the capture window.
do_not_repeat: Do not run repeated full core+named dumps on EVENT_SECOND_TIMER for interactive discovery.
Do not assume the user can open additional UI while the logger is producing tens of thousands of log lines.
Do not mark v30 aggressive multipass as a successful maximum-coverage method.
safer_next_patterns: One-shot full dump after user manually opens target UI state.
Manual or event-triggered capture for one chosen root/window at a time.
Separate lightweight root discovery from heavy subtree dumping.
Use multiple user-controlled captures instead of repeated automatic full traversals.

strategy.avoids: v30 repeated full dumps on EVENT_SECOND_TIMER

usage_guidance: Use after the target UI state is already open.
Do not expect the user to interact during the dump; it is still heavy.
For interactive discovery, build a lighter manual/scoped logger instead of full combined dump.

context-depositebox-v33-bank-open-visual.lesson: Bank widget structure is dynamic. A startup-only dump can see ContextDepositeBox and DepositeBoxContentInner but miss SlotsPlate01/02/03. A watcher or post-open capture is required for visual bank slots.

evidence.user_visual_result: side panel and scroll disappeared, but slots still appeared vertical

context-depositebox-v34-bank-columns-pla.lesson: SlotsPlate widgets accept SetPlacementPlain, but moving plates horizontally is not enough. The outer ContextDepositeBox/MainPanel bank window clips the widened content, so layout addons must widen the outer bank root/main panel or use a narrower two-column layout.

LuaApi/FunctionContainerLibGetItems.html and GetItem(slotType, slot) are the read path to item ids.

bagbankmover-v6-v61-remort-move-scroll-i.title: BagBankMover v6 vs v61 - RemortList movement and scroll isolation

recommendation.reason: Prefer v61 for movable RemortList/character-selection window: it preserves saved position and only adjusts the outer form height while leaving AdvancedRemortList/mainscript.luac responsible for inner scroll expansion.

bagbankmover-v6-v61-remort-move-scroll-i.core_finding_ru: Уточнение: внутреннее расширение/геометрия скролла списка воплощений относится к AdvancedRemortList/mainscript.luac. BagBankMover_v61 не должен переписывать эту внутреннюю логику; его задача - двигать внешний RemortList/FormSafe и менять только sizeY внешней формы, чтобы не мешать luac-логике скролла.

drag_flow: OnDndPick stores current placement as startPlace.
First OnDndDragTo only primes coordinates because PICK and DRAG_TO can be in different coordinate spaces.
Later drag events calculate dx/dy from primed coordinates.
deltaForPlacement converts real/virtual coordinates through common.GetPosConverterParams when needed.
movedPlacement updates posX/posY and normalizes through stablePlacement.
finishDrag saves only posX/posY for remort via remortConfigFromPlacement.

jump_protection.note: Prevents RemortList from flying left/up when DND coordinates jump between coordinate spaces.

apply_saved_policy.reason: Constant reapply fights AdvancedRemortList/game refresh and causes flicker or two remembered visual states.

scroll_isolation.v61_rule: AdvancedRemortList/mainscript.luac owns the inner scroll/list expansion. BagBankMover_v61 must only resize the outer RemortList form sizeY and must not touch inner RemortList, Content, __Content, or __ScrollBar.
safe_conditions: Return while remort count is missing, zero, or list is loading.
Return when current sizeY already equals desired height.
Copy current placement and change only sizeY.
forbidden_changes: Do not force alignX/alignY to WIDGET_ALIGN_CENTER in height-only/movable version.
Do not reset posX/posY while fixing scroll.
Do not write highPosX/highPosY during height adjustment.
Do not resize inner visible list/content/scrollbar widgets.
Do not move DND source handle while drag is active.
scroll_isolation.why: The luac ARL script owns inner scroll geometry. BagBankMover owns outer window movement/placement. Mixing them causes jumps, flicker, or broken scrolling.

v6_v54.risk: Can repair ARL-style scroll geometry, but can override user moved/saved placement and cause jumps.

v61.benefit: Safer for a movable saved RemortList because scroll-size adjustment and window movement are separated.

advanced_remort_list_luac_role.role_ru: Отвечает за внутренний динамический список воплощений и логику/геометрию скролла AdvancedRemortList.
advanced_remort_list_luac_role.implication_ru: Если новая версия игры сломает именно внутреннюю luac-логику AdvancedRemortList, править это напрямую трудно без исходника/decompile/новой версии ARL. BagBankMover может только обходить проблему снаружи: не трогать внутренние виджеты скролла и корректировать внешний контейнер.

widget-tree-logger-v34-remort-built.title: WidgetTreeLogger_v34_Remort focused RemortList watcher
widget-tree-logger-v34-remort-built.strategy: Focused watcher based on WidgetTreeLogger_v33_Bank pattern. Watches RemortList for up to 180 seconds via EVENT_SECOND_TIMER, EVENT_REMORT_LIST_GAINED, and EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED. Dumps only RemortList root, RemortList.RemortList, and Content/__Content subtree when the RemortList signature changes. Intended to capture character/remort selection inner scroll geometry without the heavy full-tree v31 dump.

Use captured paths to implement open Lua replacement/augmentation for AdvancedRemortList scroll expansion.

labsinfo-remortlist-laba-data-source-and.title: LabsInfo RemortList integration and lab visit data source
findings_ru: LabsInfo уже внедряется в окно выбора воплощения: WidgetTreeLogger_v34_Remort увидел дочерний TextView Entry.Class1 с addon=UserAddon/LabsInfo внутри RemortList.RemortList.Content.__Border.__Content.Entry.
Колонка/значение лабы в таблице LabsInfo формируется из полей labWeeklyVisits и labMaxVisitsPerWeek как labWeeklyVisits.."/"..labMaxVisitsPerWeek.
Текущие посещения лабиринта берутся из matchMaking events: GetEventsList() ищет eventName == "Лабиринт" и читает eventInfo.weeklyVisits / eventInfo.maxVisitsPerWeek.
LabsInfo слушает EVENT_MATCH_MAKING_EVENTS_CHANGED, EVENT_MATCH_MAKING_EVENT_VISITS_CHANGED и EVENT_LFG_DESTINATION_VISITS_CHANGED, чтобы обновлять эти данные.
Список семьи/переродов хранится в глобальном конфиге LibConfig.Get("RemortList", false), обновляется через LibConfig.Set("RemortList", remortList, false).

Список персонажей для таблицы строится из userInfoFull; строки добавляются через AddItem(... laba=val.labWeeklyVisits.."/"..val.labMaxVisitsPerWeek, laba01=val.labWeeklyVisits, laba02=val.labMaxVisitsPerWeek ...).
labsinfo-remortlist-laba-data-source-and.implication_for_next_task_ru: Если нужно показывать/использовать лабу в окне выбора воплощения, можно либо опираться на уже внедренный LabsInfo Class1, либо читать тот же глобальный RemortList/userInfoFull источник. Для собственного аддона безопаснее не ломать LabsInfo, а учитывать его дополнительные дочерние виджеты при расчете строк/высоты.

Resizing only the outer root is insufficient: observed inner panel sizeY=320, viewport sizeY=394, and __Content sizeY=636 caused scrolling.
The v1.10 native inner-geometry replacement displayed the full list; the user reported only a residual scroll of a couple of pixels.
allodsmover-v2-native-remort-full-list-2.compatibility_finding: BankColumns v108 was not the cause: its runtime actions target ContextDepositeBox, and the focused remort logs contained no bank action or bank error during opening.
rejected_or_incomplete_approaches: Removing AdvancedRemortList without replacing its inner sizing behavior.
Changing the native full-screen root to LOW alignment while preserving sizeX=0.
Resizing only the outer RemortList root.
Hiding the scrollbar; it was unnecessary and was reverted in v1.11/v2.

bag_bank_mover_lessons_learned.question: What slowed discovery of the correct bag/bank mover method?

root_causes.issue: Widget tree was treated as enough evidence by itself.
root_causes.effect: The visible bank child ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel looked like the window to move, but the correct movable root is ContextDepositeBox.
root_causes.future_rule: When a window has a container/root plus visual panel, test or inspect which root owns the whole interaction area before moving a child panel.

root_causes.issue: Existing installed/reference addons were not checked early enough.
root_causes.effect: Several experimental versions were made before comparing against BagBankMover_v5, which already encoded the working pattern.
root_causes.future_rule: Before inventing DND logic, search the addon folders and project knowledge for an existing addon that moves a similar window.

root_causes.issue: Native DND and overlay DND were mixed without a per-window rule.
root_causes.effect: The bag native header failed because it was already registered; the bank overlay worked mechanically but created invisible clickable areas.
root_causes.future_rule: Use overlay DND only when the native handle is unavailable or already registered. Prefer native header DND when it works cleanly.

root_causes.issue: Drop event coordinates were assumed to be sufficient.
root_causes.effect: The bag could snap back because EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT may not carry the latest cursor coordinates.
root_causes.future_rule: Persist lastPlace from EVENT_DND_DRAG_TO; on drop, save lastPlace instead of recomputing from drop params.

root_causes.issue: Saved placement was applied too late for reopening hidden windows.
root_causes.effect: The bag appeared at its default position and then visibly jumped to the saved position.
root_causes.future_rule: Apply saved placement to hidden windows too and subscribe with SetOnShowNotification / EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED.

root_causes.issue: Placement anchors were preserved too literally from the original widget.
root_causes.effect: BOTH/HIGH or inner-panel placements can create visual/interaction drift for moved game windows.
root_causes.future_rule: Normalize saved movable-window placements to stable low anchors unless the reference addon proves another model is required.

decision_tree_for_future_window_movers: 1. Search existing addons and DB/index for a reference implementation before writing a new DND mover.
2. Identify the logical root to move, not only the visible panel; prefer the parent that owns the full window interaction area.
3. Try native header as DND source if DNDGetState reports DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED and it does not create side effects.
4. Use an addon overlay handle only for windows whose native title/header is already registered or otherwise unusable.
5. Store lastPlace on drag updates and save it on drop.
6. Apply saved placement while hidden and on EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED to avoid visible jumps.

specific_bag_bank_conclusion.bag: Native ContextBag.Bag.Header is already DND-registered; use transparent addon BagMoveHandle overlay and move ContextBag.Bag.
specific_bag_bank_conclusion.bank: Use native ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel.HeaderText as DND source and move the ContextDepositeBox root; do not use a bank overlay and do not move MainPanel.

runtime_documents.name: WidgetTreeLogger v6/v20 coverage comparison
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: v6/v20 coverage comparison
runtime_documents.text: Verified from captured mods log. WidgetTreeLogger_v20 core tree: 18852 unique raw paths, one stateMainForm root, rich apiType/instanceId/parentName metadata. WidgetTreeLogger_v6 named roots: 20301 unique raw paths, 142 roots. After stripping stateMainForm. prefix, union is 20302, in both 18851, only v20 1, only v6 1450. Maximum coverage should combine v20 core tree and v6 named roots.

runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: WidgetTreeLogger_v30 combined maximum coverage strategy
runtime_documents.text: Built but not yet verified by captured mods log. WidgetTreeLogger_v30 combines GetWidgetCoreTree(stateMainForm), GetChildUnchecked known roots, GetNamedChildren traversal, and repeated passes at 0, 2, 5, 10, and 20 seconds via EVENT_SECOND_TIMER. Verify after capturing a new mods.txt.

runtime_documents.name: PAK build store mode and broken tooling findings
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime build knowledge: .pak ZIP_STORED requirements and broken approaches
runtime_documents.text: Verified 2026-06-04. Allods .pak must be a zip archive with true stored entries. Use Python zipfile.ZIP_STORED and verify CompressedLength equals Length. Broken or unsuitable approaches: PowerShell Compress-Archive rejects .pak extension directly and does not provide verified store mode; .NET CompressionLevel.NoCompression can still create deflate entries where CompressedLength differs from Length. Do not overwrite existing pak files and avoid double-version names such as WidgetTreeLogger_v21_v1.pak.

runtime_documents.name: WidgetTreeLogger_v30 aggressive multipass freeze finding
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: WidgetTreeLogger_v30 aggressive multipass is not suitable for interactive capture
runtime_documents.text: Verified from captured mods log 2026-06-04. WidgetTreeLogger_v30 aggressive multi-pass design caused the game client to hang/freeze during capture, so the user could not interactively open additional widgets during the 20 second window. The log contains 56664 WidgetTreeLogger_v30 lines. pass=20 ran from about 14:33:15 to 14:33:32 and produced core totalNodes=19362 plus named roots totalNodes=24443. This approach is unsuitable for interactive maximum coverage. Do not repeat heavy full-tree dumps on EVENT_SECOND_TIMER while expecting the user to open UI. Prefer one-shot capture after the user prepares UI state, manual trigger, smaller scoped roots, or delayed capture without repeated full traversals.

runtime_documents.name: WidgetTreeLogger_v31 combined one-shot strategy
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: WidgetTreeLogger_v31 combined one-shot logger
runtime_documents.text: Built 2026-06-04. WidgetTreeLogger_v31 combines v20 GetWidgetCoreTree(stateMainForm) core traversal and v6 GetChildUnchecked known roots + GetNamedChildren named traversal, but performs only one pass=0 dump and does not use EVENT_SECOND_TIMER. It is intended to avoid the v30 aggressive multipass freeze. Status is built_unverified_until_next_captured_mods_log.

runtime_documents.name: WidgetTreeLogger_v31 combined one-shot verified result
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: WidgetTreeLogger_v31 verified one-shot combined result
runtime_documents.text: Verified from captured mods log 2026-06-04. WidgetTreeLogger_v31 performed a single combined pass=0 without timer repeats. It wrote 41798 lines, began at 14:47:13 and ended at 14:47:29. Core dump totalNodes=18861, named roots dump totalNodes=22786. It is a working combined snapshot logger, but still heavy and takes about 16 seconds, so use it after the desired UI state is already open rather than expecting interactive actions during the dump.

runtime_documents.name: WidgetTreeLogger_v32_Bank focused bank logger
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: WidgetTreeLogger_v32_Bank focused ContextDepositeBox logger
runtime_documents.text: Built 2026-06-04. WidgetTreeLogger_v32_Bank is a focused bank logger for ContextDepositeBox. It probes known bank paths including stateMainForm.ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel.DepositeBoxContainer.__Border.__Content.DepositeBoxContentInner.SlotsPlate and ContextDepositeBox.SlotsPlate, then dumps the bank core subtree if found and the named subtree from stateMainForm:GetChildUnchecked("ContextDepositeBox", false). Status is built_unverified_until_next_captured_mods_log_and_InspectWidgets_screenshot.

runtime_documents.name: ContextDepositeBox bank open visual slots confirmed
runtime_documents.api_name: Runtime widget knowledge: ContextDepositeBox SlotsPlate01/02/03 confirmed after bank opens
runtime_documents.text: Verified from WidgetTreeLogger_v33_Bank captured mods log and user InspectWidgets screenshots. At init, ContextDepositeBox exists but visual plates under DepositeBoxContentInner are missing: SlotsPlate01/02/03=missing, mainVisible=0, named slotsPlate=9406. After the bank opens, signature changes: mainVisible=1, named slotsPlate=missing, inner=9405, SlotsPlate01=9406, SlotsPlate02=28981, SlotsPlate03=29174. Confirmed visual path prefix: ContextDepositeBox.MainPanel.DepositeBoxContainer.__Border.__Content.DepositeBoxContentInner.SlotsPlate01/02/03. Each plate dumped 193 nodes. For open bank slot work, prefer visual paths under DepositeBoxContentInner.SlotsPlate01/02/03 over the older named ContextDepositeBox.SlotsPlate path.
